top_story.title: Intel stock hits record high, Hut 8's Google-backed data center
top_story.summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Producer John Hyland tracks Friday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories. The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is on track for its fourth straight week of gains. Intel (INTC) stock is skyrocketing after the company reported earnings, reaching a new all-time high.  Crypto miner Hut 8 (HUT) is reportedly tapping the bond market to raise money for a Google-backed (GOOG, GOOGL) data center.
